programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea

Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kale Powder
programme.desc: The Kale is a superfood packed with 23 essential nutrients to support daily dietary needs. Our organic pure kale powder contains no additives, preservatives, added antioxidants, or colorants, making it suitable for all ages to maintain a healthy lifestyle. 羽衣甘蓝是一种富含23种必需营养素的超级食物，可满足日常膳食需求。我们的有机纯羽衣甘蓝粉无添加剂、防腐剂、抗氧化剂和色素，适合所有年龄段人群，有助于保持健康.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kplass Cough and Flu Relief Patch
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family. 无需药物的贴布，结合远红外线和穴位疗法，自然缓解感冒症状。感冒缓解贴舒缓鼻塞、流鼻涕、鼻窦压力和寒冷不适。止咳贴有成人装和儿童装，帮助缓解咳嗽、喉咙不适，同时促进血液循环，让呼吸更顺畅、睡眠更安心。温和贴肤，每天可用，长达6小时舒适守护，全家都适用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. programme.title: Dua
programme.desc: Kisah Farhan yang kehilangan kembarnya Fahrin dalam satu kemalangan tragis. Dia kemudiannya mengambil-alih kehidupan Fahrin namun terperangkap dalam sebuah cinta tiga segi pula. Lakonan Eusoff Hashim dan Sharifah Sakinah.

programme.title: Racun Menantu

programme.title: Sekolah Api

programme.title: Balapan

programme.title: Lampu Merah
programme.desc: Si lelaki sukakan si perempuan, tanpa sedar yang si perempuan itu psiko dan obses dengan cintanya. Cara untuk selamatkan diri hanya dengan jatuh cinta dengan si perempuan semula.

programme.title: Bini Aku Dari...

programme.title: Tebus

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada going hiking to Gunung Tahan with her friends. Unfortunately, she got lost and fell into a deep hole and trapped there for 19 days.

programme.title: Cik Paris Diva Kampung

programme.title: Budak Dari Tak Bai

programme.title: Football's Greatest Stage - Lionel Messi - EP1

programme.title: Football Nation - Brazil - EP1

programme.title: Football Nation - Germany - EP1

programme.title: Foul Play - David Beckham - EP22
programme.desc: David Beckham's red card at the 1996 World Cup, Sepp Blatter and FIFA corruption, and Argentine football club Boca Junior cross enemy territory by bus.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Fungal Bungle / Water Friends For? - EP114
programme.desc: Kent’s extreme attempts to cure his toe fungus in time for a pool party cause the fungus to mutate and grow into a fungus-based replica of Kent himself. The Secret Lab Kids have to stop the replicant before it turns the whole lab into a stinky, sticky fungus-farm. / When Kent manages to contact aliens, they land at the Edison complex and demand that the Secret Lab kids help them find a very valuable "treasure" that their planet needs. The trouble is, they don't know the earth word for this treasure - sending our kids scrambling to solve this mystery before they get turned into "shrablitz”!

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep21 - EP121
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Pilot - EP101
programme.desc: When a mother loses control of her baby stroller, the Shaq Paq works together to return her baby safe and sound.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep10 - EP110
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep4 - EP4
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Communication - EP116
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover the value and importance of communication. We will learn the correct ways to communicate and the main rules of the good listener. We will know in which sites we can raise our voice and when we should respect the silence of others. We will talk about rumours and how harmful they are for effective communication.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Dignity - EP117
programme.desc: In this episode we will discover the value of dignity, finding that it goes hand in hand with self-love and self-esteem. We must value ourselves and respect ourselves first and then others. Being respectful is a rule to be able to live in harmony and dignity. It takes dignity to ask for forgiveness and to forgive!

programme.desc: Fetch a pail of water with Dee to keep his little fish happy at home.

programme.desc: Neela and Leonardo discover MUSIC! Zachary introduces musical instruments to Leonardo and he decides that he will be Earth's Greatest Trumpet Player. So now he needs promotional materials including a dancer. He sees Neela's rhythmless dancing and is convinced she is the best dancer he has ever seen! Now to film a music video. Zachary panics and tells Raffles that they are about to be exposed!

programme.title: What On Earth - EP 14
programme.desc: Spectacular Music Ians is launched and no one is watching it. Undefeated, Leonardo decides that the way to success is to get Chad Mando, the coolest kid in class, on the case. Sure enough, Chad to shares it on TikTok! Zachary realizes that this will attract enormous attention to the aliens and their weirdness! He urges Raffles to force the 2 aliens to take the video down.

programme.desc: Japan cruised through AFC Asian Qualifiers but Qatar were made to toil on the Road to 26.

programme.title: Moma: Moments of Modern Art - EP 1

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal - EP 4
programme.desc: MY BEST FRIEND'S AN ANIMAL is an emotive, heart-warming series which tells the stories of humans who have unlikely and extraordinary friendships with wild animals. Featuring 6 compelling stories per episode and filmed all over the world. The series proves that when it comes to friendship, shape, size, or even species is irrelevant. Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surprising places.

programme.title: Don't Forget the Lyrics S7 - EP 2
programme.desc: Contestants must attempt to sing through and fill in the missing lyrics to TEN of the biggest hit songs of all time! But when the music stops, the contestant must correctly provide the missing song lyrics. If a contestant can successfully make it through the first 9 songs without missing a SINGLE lyric, they'll have the chance to play a 10th and final song for a shot at ONE MILLION DOLLARS!

programme.title: Films & Stars - EP 14
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather S6 - EP 11

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Day Express - EP 29
programme.desc: Match Day Express brings you the goals, the plays, and the heroes of all 104 matches of the FIFA World Cup 2026!

programme.title: The Black Demon
programme.desc: Paul Sturges takes his family on a trip to Mexico to inspect an oil rig his company owns. Once they get out there, he finds the place almost abandoned with only a few terrified workers left who tell him that the rig has been repeatedly attacked by a monstrous shark that is part of a Mexican legend. With the rig sinking into the water and the shark hunting them, he must find a way to get his family to safety and stay alive.

programme.title: Super Dad - EP 13 男神不败

programme.title: Gengster Leng Chai
programme.desc: Black is a failure of a gangster, being too soft hearted with people. After meeting Mawar, he is determined to change despite the objections of others.

programme.title: Strawberi Karipap Sesat Kat Paris
programme.desc: Nini and Haikal start their big adventure to find their aunty Lisa who gets a job offer as a professional photographer in Paris. Unfortunately, their journey turns upside down when they arrive in Paris and ruin a newly-wed coupleís honeymoon.

programme.title: Nota Silam

programme.title: Bukan Cerita Cinta Cliche

programme.title: Puyah & Putat
programme.desc: Kisah pengembaraan Puyah, seorang gadis kampung becok yang disukai ramai, apabila dia melawat Kuala Lumpur dan termasuk set filem secara tak sengaja, dan tak semena-mena mula mendapat nama sebagai pelakon.

programme.desc: In 1999, Manchester United were invincible, becoming the first English football club to win the treble, and all this in the space of 10 days.

programme.title: Invincible - Serena Williams - EP11
programme.desc: Serena Williams dominated 2015, winning three Grand Slam tournaments in that year, while carrying out a second Serena Slam.

programme.title: Invincible - Tiger Woods - EP12
programme.desc: Tiger Woods took control of golf between 1999 and April 2001, by winning five of the six major tournaments and adjudicating the Tiger Slam.

programme.title: Invincible - Max Verstappen - EP13
programme.desc: In 2022 Max Verstappen of Red Bull established a new reference point in the field of F1 excellence, by winning a record 15 races to become double world champion.

programme.desc: From 2004 to 2008, Michael Phelps was invincible, rewriting the history of the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Foul Play - Hot Heels - EP26
programme.desc: Controversy engulfed the women's 3,000 metre race at Los Angeles 1984, the other side of South African athletic star Oscar Pistorius and the swindler who introduced themselves at the 1980 Boston marathon.

programme.title: Star Block Workout - Top Scorers - EP27
programme.desc: In the 'Urban Fit Special Guests' series, travel from Paris to London, via Johannesburg, and meet "Boost" (@mrblockworkout). This 23-year-old former bad boy has created his own fitness training, exclusively using his body and the surrounding urban environment.

programme.title: Flashpoint - David Beckham/ Michaeal Phelps/ Eric The Eel - EP18
programme.desc: David Beckham's career changed following a red card. The journey of Michael Phelps began by simply climbing on the highest step of the podium. And Eric the Eel won many hearts.

programme.title: Invincible - Sir Bradley Wiggins - EP8
programme.desc: The great Bradley Wiggins entered into history in 2012, becoming the first man to win the Tour de France and an Olympic gold medal in the same year.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep1 - EP101
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Contest - EP102
programme.desc: Biggie D enters a truck pull contest but soon realizes he'll need more training to win the gold.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep11 - EP111
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep5 - EP5
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Dignity - EP117
programme.desc: In this episode we will discover the value of dignity, finding that it goes hand in hand with self-love and self-esteem. We must value ourselves and respect ourselves first and then others. Being respectful is a rule to be able to live in harmony and dignity. It takes dignity to ask for forgiveness and to forgive!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Confidence, Honesty, and Integrity - EP118
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover the values of confidence, honesty and integrity. We will learn that we build trust by fulfilling the promises we make to others. Honesty means telling the truth, which also shows respect for others. We will understand that having integrity means that in addition to being honest, we also choose to do what is right.

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.
